en: Teeth. F***ed up.
If that gross, ratty old man George Clooney can find a girl,
ko: 그 더럽고 초라한 노인 조지 클루니가 여자를 찾을 수 있다면,

en: you regular fellas out there in the Twitterverse
must be drowning in p***.
Jessica Chastain looks like Julia Roberts' ghost.
ko: 제시카 차스테인은 줄리아 로버츠의 유령 같아.

en: I like that one.
Eddie Redmayne looks like someone tried to erase his nose
ko: 에디 레드메인은 누군가 그의 코를 지우려다 실패한 것 같아.

en: but couldn't completely.
I also think he looks perpetually dehydrated,
ko: 그는 항상 탈수 상태인 것 같아,

en: which I am. I'm really thirsty.
Tired of Susan Sarandon having her big,
faggy boobs in my face.
ko: 이상한 가슴이 내 얼굴에 있는 게 지겨워.

en: All you wish.
Kevin Costner is a boring b****
with some long-ass movies.
Where are you going?
Emily Blunt's got a purdy mouth
that I'd like to poop in.
I hate when Zach Galifianakis plays serious roles.
ko: 잭 갈리피아나키스가 진지한 역할을 할 때 싫어.

en: That's what Dakota Fanning is for.
